review_notes: The functions accurately map to Kubernetes security controls related to network access and monitoring. Naming conventions are mostly followed, but a minor improvement could be made for clarity and consistency.
naming_improvements: Consider renaming 'k8s_service_type_loadbalancer_restricted' to 'k8s_service_loadbalancer_usage_restricted' for better clarity.
title: Remote Access | Monitoring and Control
step1_reasoning: The control AC-17 (1) focuses on monitoring and controlling remote access, which in the context of Kubernetes can be mapped to ensuring that network access is restricted and monitored. This involves using NetworkPolicies to enforce default deny rules for ingress and egress traffic, restricting the use of LoadBalancer services to prevent exposing services unnecessarily, and ensuring that any ingress traffic is secured with TLS. These measures help in controlling and monitoring remote access to Kubernetes resources.
